cite: Kirk Hammett, Metallica, on Paulina's drumming (2014)

text: Being in a band with your sisters is a gift from heaven. We fight, we make up, and then we go on stage and create magic. There's no better feeling.
cite: The Warning, interviewed by People Magazine (2025)

text: The Warning is a band on the warpath, spearheading an album with so much lyrical and musical energy. Their sound has a mix of well-tuned guitar parts which are electrifying and atmospheric.

The band's presence at the Latin GRAMMY Awards represents more than just a nomination. It symbolizes the evolving nature of Latin music, where rock acts like The Warning are helping to reshape the industry.
cite: The Warning Pit, on their historic Latin GRAMMY nomination (2024)

text: That game gave us our first idea of what a rock star was.
cite: Daniela Villarreal, on learning music through Rock Band (2023)

text: The Warning draw strength and power from a lifetime of sisterhood and music.
